query:
SELECT
               COUNT(*) as "count!",
               MAX(time) as max_time,
               COALESCE(SUM((close * 10000)::bigint), 0)::bigint as "sum_close_scaled!: i64",
               COALESCE(SUM(volume), 0)::bigint as "sum_volume!: i64"
           FROM ohlcv
           WHERE ticker_id = $1 AND interval = '1D'
           AND time >= $2 AND time < $3
